steps.title: Use one mountain's two values
steps.content: The example must show that elevation and prominence can differ significantly. The strongest evidence compares those two measurements for the same mountain, not different mountains.

steps.title: Pick the direct contrast
steps.content: B and C compare separate mountains, so they do not show a within-mountain gap. D gives elevation without prominence. A single mountain with 7,495 meters of elevation but 850 meters of prominence shows the difference clearly. The answer is A.
